dialect_note: Actual SQL dialect is determined at runtime by config.settings.is_sqlite (SQLite in dev, PostgreSQL in prod)

orders_buyer.description: Stores information about buyers who place orders.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the buyer was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the buyer was last updated.

orders_style.description: Garment style definitions — each style has a style number, category (shirt, trouser, jacket, etc.) and is linked to BOM items.

category.description: Garment category: shirt, trouser, jacket, dress, polo, sweater, other

orders_order.description: Purchase orders from buyers. Each order links a buyer and style with quantity, pricing, and status tracking. Central entity for production, shipping, and invoicing.

status.description: Order status: draft, confirmed, in_production, shipped, completed, cancelled

orders_bomitem.description: Bill of Materials — line items for each style, defining fabric, trims, and accessories with consumption rates and costs.

category.description: Material category: fabric, trim, accessory, packaging, label, other

orders_costingsheet.description: Order cost breakdown — CM cost, fabric cost, trims, wash, print/embroidery, overhead, commercial, and profit margin. One per order.

orders_timeaction.description: Time & Action calendar milestones for each order — planned vs actual dates for fabric arrival, cutting, sewing, finishing, shipment, etc.

milestone.description: Milestone name (e.g. Fabric In, Cutting Start, Shipment)

orders_lead.description: CRM sales leads / prospects with pipeline stage tracking, priority, expected value, and win probability.

company.description: Company name if no buyer linked

stage.description: Pipeline stage: new, contacted, qualified, proposal, negotiation, won, lost

source.description: Source: website, referral, trade_show, email, cold_call, linkedin, other

orders_campaign.description: Marketing campaigns — budget, spend, lead generation, conversions, and ROI tracking for buyer acquisition.

channel.description: Channel: trade_show, digital_ads, email_campaign, social_media, referral_program, cold_outreach, other

orders_sample.description: Sample tracking from development through buyer approval — salesman, pre-production, size set, and shipment samples.

sample_type.description: Type: sms, pp, size_set, pre_prod, top, shipment

status.description: Status: pending, in_development, submitted, approved, rejected, revised

production_production.description: Production stage tracking — cutting, sewing, finishing, QC, packing with quantity, defects, and progress per order.

stage.description: Stage: cutting, sewing, finishing, qc, packing

production_inspection.description: AQL quality inspections — inline, endline, final, pre-shipment with defect counts by severity and pass/fail result.

production_complianceaudit.description: Factory compliance audits — social, environmental, quality, fire safety. Tracks BSCI/WRAP/SEDEX certifications, scores, findings.

audit_type.description: Type: social, environmental, quality_system, fire_safety, structural

certification.description: Standard: bsci, wrap, sedex, oeko_tex, gots, iso9001, sa8000, other

production_machine.description: Factory machines — sewing machines, cutting tables, pressing equipment. Tracks status, maintenance, depreciation.

production_maintenancelog.description: Machine maintenance records — preventive, corrective, breakdown, calibration with cost and downtime.

production_productiontarget.description: Daily production targets vs achievement per line — target qty, achieved qty, rejections, overtime for efficiency analysis.

production_cuttingplan.description: Fabric cutting plans — marker planning with ply count, consumption, wastage, and actual vs planned quantities.

finance_invoice.description: Sales invoices linked to orders and buyers — amounts, discounts, taxes, payment status, aging.

status.description: Status: draft, sent, partial, paid, overdue, cancelled

finance_payment.description: Payment records against invoices — bank transfers, LC, TT, cheque with references.

method.description: Method: bank_transfer, lc, tt, cheque, cash, other

finance_account.description: Chart of Accounts — GL accounts organized hierarchically. Types: asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense.

account_type.description: Type: asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense

finance_journalentry.description: Journal entry headers with balanced debit/credit lines for double-entry bookkeeping.

finance_journalline.description: Debit/credit lines within journal entries — each references a GL account.

finance_bankaccount.description: Company bank accounts — checking, savings, petty cash, LC with balances.

finance_banktransaction.description: Bank transactions — deposits, withdrawals, transfers, fees with running balance.

finance_budget.description: Monthly budget vs actual per department and expense account — for variance analysis.

finance_letterofcredit.description: Letter of Credit management — LC lifecycle from draft to payment with banks, amendments, and discrepancies.

lc_type.description: Type: at_sight, usance, deferred, revolving, transferable, back_to_back

status.description: Status: draft, applied, opened, amended, documents_submitted, accepted, discrepant, paid, expired, cancelled

inventory_inventory.description: Raw material inventory — fabric, trims, accessories, packaging with stock levels and reorder points.

inventory_stocktransaction.description: Stock movement ledger — every stock-in and stock-out with running balance and reference.

inventory_supplier.description: Raw material suppliers — fabric mills, trim vendors with contact info and category.

inventory_purchaseorder.description: Raw material purchase orders to suppliers — tracks order status from draft through receipt.

status.description: Status: draft, sent, partial, received, cancelled

inventory_grn.description: Goods Received Notes — material receipt records with approval status.

inventory_warehouse.description: Warehouse master — raw material, WIP, finished goods warehouses with capacity.

type.description: Type: raw, wip, finished, cold, general

inventory_stocktransfer.description: Inter-warehouse stock transfers — material movement between warehouses.

hr_employee.description: Employee master — personal info, department, designation, salary, employment status. Linked to payroll.

hr_worker.description: Factory floor workers (no login) — production-line workers identified by barcode with labor type, pay type, skill level.

hr_attendance.description: Daily attendance records — check-in/out, status (present/absent/late/half_day), overtime hours.

status.description: Status: present, absent, late, half_day, leave, holiday, early_leave, off_day

hr_leaverequest.description: Employee leave requests — annual, sick, casual, maternity, unpaid with approval workflow.

leave_type.description: Type: annual, sick, casual, maternity, unpaid, other

hr_payroll.description: Monthly payroll batches — processing status, total amount, employee count.

hr_salaryslip.description: Individual salary slips — gross, allowances, overtime, bonuses, deductions, net salary per employee per month.

logistics_shipment.description: Export shipments — sea/air/road from factory to buyer with vessel, container, ETD/ETA tracking.

status.description: Status: planning, booked, in_transit, arrived, delivered, cancelled

logistics_freightcost.description: Freight costs per shipment — ocean/air freight, customs, clearing, insurance for landed cost.

cost_type.description: Type: ocean_freight, air_freight, inland_transport, customs_duty, clearing_charges, insurance, other

logistics_shipmentbatch.description: Delivery batches within shipments — passed/rejected/goodwill quantities for rejection cost and relationship management.

resolution.description: Resolution: pending, deduct, replace, bonus, accepted

accounts_user.description: System users with authentication, roles, and department assignments.

role.description: Role: admin, manager, merchandiser, production, warehouse, quality, cutting, sewing, finishing, maintenance, hr, finance, logistics, design, compliance, receptionist, viewer
